symptoms.symptom_name: Continuous passive liquid-stool leakage without awareness

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Overflow faecal incontinence from faecal impaction
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Passive unaware leakage of liquid stool is characteristic of overflow around an impacted bolus.
Liquid stool alone does not distinguish overflow from infective causes.

symptoms.symptom_name: Two weeks of worsening constipation preceding the leakage

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Overflow faecal incontinence from faecal impaction
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Antecedent constipation is the mechanism that builds the impaction the liquid then bypasses.
A fortnight of constipation immediately before 'diarrhoea' points to overflow, not infection.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Overflow faecal incontinence from faecal impaction
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Anti-motility therapy worsens the impaction and is a reversible aggravating factor central to the case.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe perianal excoriation and skin breakdown (caregiver/video observed)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Constant acidic soiling produces excoriation; a lay/video view is suggestive but formal staging needs in-person assessment.

symptoms.symptom_name: Afebrile, no vomiting, no cramping, no recent antibiotics

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of systemic/infective features lowers the probability of an infective cause.

symptoms.symptom_name: Soft, non-rigid abdomen with no faeculent vomiting

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reassuring against established obstruction/perforation now, but remains the escalation trigger.

symptoms.symptom_name: Palpable firm faecal mass in the left lower quadrant

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Overflow faecal incontinence from faecal impaction
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Faecal loading palpable abdominally corroborates impaction — a hands-on sign the AI cannot obtain.

symptoms.symptom_name: DRE: rock-hard rectal bolus with liquid stool bypassing; reduced resting and squeeze sphincter pressure

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Overflow faecal incontinence from faecal impaction
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A hard rectal bolus with liquid bypassing is the confirmatory sign — obtainable only by an in-person DRE, sealed from the AI Doctor.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe faecal loading on plain abdominal radiograph

investigation_details.expected_result: Extensive faecal loading of the colon and rectum
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Not required when impaction is clinically evident on DRE; confirmatory only.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Overflow faecal incontinence from faecal impaction
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Corroborates faecal loading; a hospital/clinic investigation not available in telehealth.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Overflow faecal incontinence from faecal impaction
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Passive unaware liquid leakage + antecedent constipation + afebrile + palpable faecal mass + hard rectal bolus with bypassing together confirm overflow rather than infective diarrhoea.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person digital rectal examination and abdominal examination
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The pivotal confirmatory step; must be performed in person before any disimpaction — the AI can only arrange it, not perform it.
To grade the skin breakdown and guide barrier/wound care.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Medication review / reconciliation of the loperamide and bowel chart
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To formally cease the anti-motility agent and establish a bowel regimen.
